summary: Fix resolveLocal to look up equity snapshots by symbol param rather than URL path segment.
reason: The generic fallback extracted the last URL path segment (GetQuoteApi) as the store ID, but equity rows are keyed symbol_YYYYMMDD — offline fallback always returned not-found even when cached data existed.
validated_outcome: equity quote --symbol RELIANCE --data-source local returns cached snapshot with source=local.
